author: codex-audit

patch.value: Audit scope: dogfood the latest pm CLI in isolated temporary projects, inspect SDK and extension ergonomics, exercise calendar and project-management workflows, verify telemetry surfaces, document findings, and remediate issues discovered during the audit.
Manual latest-build dogfood audit covering CLI UX, SDK extensibility, calendar workflows, extension customization, and remote telemetry readiness.

All material findings are documented in pm; any feasible defects discovered are fixed and linked; verification evidence includes build, focused tests, coverage where practical, and temp-project dogfood commands.

value.author: codex-audit
value.text: Duplicate check before create: pm context --limit 10 showed no active items; pm search 'manual audit sdk calendar telemetry dogfood extensibility' returned only closed prior audits including pm-wg1d and pm-mb4n; pm list-open/list-in-progress both returned 0. Net-new scope is required for the 2026-04-30 latest-build audit.

value.author: codex-audit
value.text: Use real repository pm data only for audit tracking; all CLI dogfood project data must run in temporary PM_PATH/PM_GLOBAL_PATH sandboxes.

message: Create audit epic for latest-build dogfood sweep
